creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
Hi,
I have a problem with VirtualBox. I cannot open the virtual machine on version
FreeBSD  12.3-RELEASE-p5 FreeBSD 12.3-RELEASE-p5 GENERIC  amd64
I have also VirtualBox with FreeBSD 13.1 without a problem.

VirtualBox Graphical User Interface Version 6.1.36 r152435

Failed to open a session for the virtual machine tests.

Failed to load R0 module /usr/local/lib/virtualbox/VMMR0.r0: Unable to locate imported symbol 'SUPR0FpuBegin' for module 'VMMR0.r0' (VERR_SYMBOL_NOT_FOUND).

Failed to load VMMR0.r0 (VERR_SYMBOL_NOT_FOUND).

Result Code: NS_ERROR_FAILURE (0x80004005)
Component: ConsoleWrap
Interface: IConsole {872da645-4a9b-1727-bee2-5585105b9eed}
